snippet.title: DTE Energy committed to Ann Arbor's 100% renewable energy goal, CEO Jerry Norcia says
snippet.description: Despite opposing Ann Arbor's proposed ban on gas service for new buildings, DTE Energy CEO Jerry Norcia says the utility company is committed to partnering with Ann Arbor on its goal to power the community with 100% renewable energy by 2030. He spoke before a crowd of city officials and others at the Broadway Park West groundbreaking ceremony Jan. 31, 2023.

localized.title: DTE Energy committed to Ann Arbor's 100% renewable energy goal, CEO Jerry Norcia says

snippet.title: What DTE Energy is saying after ice storm caused massive power outage across Metro Detroit
snippet.description: As hundreds of thousands who lost power in last week's ice storm now anticipate this next round of winter weather Local 4 asked on our Facebook page, "What's one question you would ask the CEO of DTE?"     Not surprisingly, we got hundreds of responses. And Thursday (March 2), I had the chance to ask many of those questions of Jerry Norcia in a one-on-one interview.

snippet.title: Have You Struggled With Vulnerability? #LeadingWithVulnerability #leadership #shorts
snippet.description:
DTE Energy CEO Jerry Norcia’s journey to embracing vulnerability in leadership wasn't an overnight transformation. But with practice, what seems challenging became his second nature, leading to deeper, more genuine conversations. 

Jerry Norcia is one of the 100+ CEOs I interviewed for my new book, Leading With Vulnerability which is out now! Check it out here: https://www.amazon.com/Leading-Vulnerability-Superpower-Transform-Organization/dp/1119895243/

#LeadingWithVulnerability #leadership

----------------------------------------------

If you enjoyed this video, please like and subscribe! It helps the channel grow and allows us to make more. Thank you!
https://www.youtube.com/user/jacobmorgan8/featured?sub_confirmation=1

--------------------------------------------------

Jacob Morgan is a keynote speaker, best-selling author, and futurist. He explores how the world of work is changing, what the future of work is going to look like, and we need to do to prepare. To work with Jacob or have him speak at your event visit TheFutureOrganization.com

snippet.title: Why Your Greatest Strength Is Also Your Greatest Weakness - Jerry Norcia, CEO & President DTE Energy
snippet.description:
If you enjoyed this video, please like and subscribe! It helps the channel grow and allows us to make more. Thank you!
https://greatleadership.substack.com/p/jerry-norcia-ceo-dte-energy-leadership

----------------------------------------------

In today's dynamic world, vulnerability isn't a sign of weakness, but a badge of authentic leadership. 

By embracing vulnerability, leaders pave the way for inclusive decision-making processes where everyone's voice feels valued. 

Jerry Norcia, Chairman and CEO of DTE Energy, believes that being a good leader means being real and honest. 

He believes in treating everyone the same and he also thinks that leaders should be trustworthy, do what they say, care about others, and be confident. 

Learn more about Jerry’s leadership journey and how he embraced vulnerable leadership here:

Jerry Norcia is one of the 100+ CEOs I interviewed for my new book, Leading With Vulnerability which is out now! Check it out here: https://www.amazon.com/Leading-Vulnerability-Superpower-Transform-Organization/dp/1119895243/ 

#LeadingWithVulnerability #leadership #authenticity #honesty #openness

--------------------------------------------------

Jacob Morgan is a keynote speaker, best-selling author, and futurist. He explores how the world of work is changing, what the future of work is going to look like, and we need to do to prepare. To work with Jacob or have him speak at your event visit TheFutureOrganization.com
